notes: Saw no zombie processes like others reported, game runs and closes just fine. Easily hit over 144 fps at 1080p ultra.
title: Aim Lab

notes: Ran perfectly with no configuration, was able to stay locked at 144fps with excellent frametimes and no noticeable input lag. I did not notice zombie processes as the other reports did, however when closing the game I was forced to kill it with "killall AimLab_tb.exe" which did indeed kill the game. Aside from not quitting cleanly, I would have given this a platinum rating.
title: Aim Lab

notes: Everything works perfectly out of the box, on highest settings and with great performance. Tested different play modes and settings, but I did not create a profile.
